findingDetails.title: Recycle stress re-models the production replay path instead of driving it
findingDetails.evidence: The stress helper reimplements production replaySnapshot and the load assertions use that helper; production replaySnapshot enqueues socket/output frames and is module-private, while existing integration tests do not cover successful-recycle unsafe pending mutation error emission under load.
findingDetails.claim: The new recycle stress proves replayable reads survive and unsafe in-flight mutations get -32001 under load.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Searched launcher-session-proxy.vitest.ts for createSessionProxy integration coverage of unsafe pending requests; found classification, reattach-exhaustion, and single replay/protocol-drift coverage, but no successful reattach unsafe pending mutation output assertion.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: The parallel model may be intentional because replaySnapshot is module-private and the stress avoids sockets.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade/close if a production-path test drives successful reattach with replayable and unsafe pending requests and asserts fresh-socket replay plus exactly one -32001 client error for unsafe requests.

findingDetails.title: Checkpoint stress assertion masks a missing snapshotFormat return field
findingDetails.evidence: The test uses created.snapshotFormat ?? 'v2', so it passes when snapshotFormat is absent even though createCheckpointV2 currently returns snapshotFormat: 'v2'.

checklist_evidence.reason: traceability dimension owns full checklist evidence pass

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: 73-file cross-domain review scope with executable stress tests, docs, specs, changelogs, and server metadata.

targetSelection.selectionReason: Selected highest-value executable code from config plus production/counterevidence anchors needed to adjudicate correctness claims.
omittedHighRiskTargets: README cluster, feature catalog, manual testing playbook, and checklist evidence deferred to traceability/maintainability dimensions
targetSelection.graphStatus: unavailable: code graph stale; git HEAD changed and stale files exceeded selective threshold
targetSelection.semanticSearchStatus: partial: memory triggers had no direct hit; exact Grep and direct reads used

searchLedger.invariant: ServerInfo metadata and package metadata must both reflect 1.8.0.

searchActions.result: context-server.ts advertises mk-spec-memory 1.8.0; package.json version is 1.8.0

searchLedger.rationale: No version drift in reviewed server metadata.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Direct read and exact search matched 1.8.0 in both metadata surfaces.

searchLedger.hypothesis: The daemon recycle stress might validate a parallel model rather than the production replay/error path.

searchActions.result: Found replayAcrossRecycle helper modeling replaySnapshot and assertions using it under load.
Production replaySnapshot enqueues socket/output frames and is not exported through __testing.

searchLedger.rationale: The stress gate can pass while production successful-recycle unsafe-mutation behavior regresses.

searchLedger.hypothesis: The checkpoint stress may not require the returned snapshotFormat contract.

searchActions.result: Assertion defaults missing snapshotFormat to v2.

searchLedger.rationale: The test masks a cheap metadata-regression signal.

searchLedger.invariant: Stress tests must use throwaway DBs/helpers and avoid production DB/socket access.

searchActions.result: Checkpoint uses mkdtemp DB, enrichment and index-scan use in-memory DBs, and daemon recycle uses pure helper logic.

searchLedger.rationale: No production DB/socket access found in the reviewed stress setup.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Direct reads show throwaway DBs or pure logic helpers.
